tool_design.role_in_intervention: Per-item declaration record that proves how the venue decided the allergen status of an item.
tool_design.usage_moment: When a recipe is created, changed, or reverified
tool_design.expected_output: Completed recipe and ingredient declaration sheet with ingredient list, sub-ingredient notes, allergen outcome, and sign-off

failure_warnings.warning: The sheet records headline ingredients but not the sub-ingredients that drive allergen risk.
failure_warnings.what_can_go_wrong: Hidden allergens are missed and the matrix is built on incomplete evidence.
early_signals: Compound ingredients are listed without brand or declaration detail
Notes say 'standard pesto' or 'house sauce' with no breakdown
prevention: Capture supplier brand and sub-ingredient source for every compound input
mitigation: Reopen the declaration sheet and trace every compound ingredient
Mark the item unresolved until evidence is complete

failure_warnings.warning: Recipe sheets are created once and never revised after yield, garnish, or supplier changes.
failure_warnings.what_can_go_wrong: The supporting evidence becomes older than the live product.
early_signals: Recipe version does not match current menu spec
The matrix changes but the declaration sheet date stays old
prevention: Link recipe sheet updates to the change-review gate
Show version number and last checked date on every sheet
mitigation: Archive old versions and reissue the current sheet
Audit every live item that has changed since the last review

content:
# Recipe Card & Ingredient Declaration Sheet

**Tool ID:** T005-02  
**Block:** B005 (Allergen Identification & Labelling)  
**Format:** Template  
**Primary Role:** Kitchen Lead  
**Use Moment:** When a recipe is created, amended, or reverified  
**Output:** One signed declaration sheet per live item

---

## What This Tool Does

This sheet is the evidence behind a row in the allergen matrix. Complete one for every own-made item and for any bought-in product where the venue needs a structured local record.

Use one sheet per item.

---

## Item Identity

| Field | Complete Here |
|---|---|
| Menu item name | |
| Category | Drink / Food / Bakery / Sauce / Modifier / Special |
| Item code or POS name | |
| Version number | |
| Yield / portion size | |
| Prepared in-house or bought-in? | |
| Date issued | |
| Next review date | |
| Prepared by | |
| Verified by | |

---

## Ingredient Declaration Table

| Ingredient / Component | Brand / Supplier | Qty per Batch or Portion | Sub-ingredients Checked? | Allergens Present | Hidden-Risk Notes | Evidence File Ref |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| | | | Yes / No | | | |
| | | | Yes / No | | | |
| | | | Yes / No | | | |
| | | | Yes / No | | | |
| | | | Yes / No | | | |
| | | | Yes / No | | | |
| | | | Yes / No | | | |

---

## Final Allergen Outcome

| Allergen | Present | May Contain / Cross-Contact | Not Present | Notes |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| Celery | <input type="checkbox" disabled /> | <input type="checkbox" disabled /> | <input type="checkbox" disabled /> | |
| Gluten | <input type="checkbox" disabled /> | <input type="checkbox" disabled /> | <input type="checkbox" disabled /> | |
| Crustaceans | <input type="checkbox" disabled /> | <input type="checkbox" disabled /> | <input type="checkbox" disabled /> | |
| Eggs | <input type="checkbox" disabled /> | <input type="checkbox" disabled /> | <input type="checkbox" disabled /> | |
| Fish | <input type="checkbox" disabled /> | <input type="checkbox" disabled /> | <input type="checkbox" disabled /> | |
| Lupin | <input type="checkbox" disabled /> | <input type="checkbox" disabled /> | <input type="checkbox" disabled /> | |
| Milk | <input type="checkbox" disabled /> | <input type="checkbox" disabled /> | <input type="checkbox" disabled /> | |
| Molluscs | <input type="checkbox" disabled /> | <input type="checkbox" disabled /> | <input type="checkbox" disabled /> | |
| Mustard | <input type="checkbox" disabled /> | <input type="checkbox" disabled /> | <input type="checkbox" disabled /> | |
| Tree nuts | <input type="checkbox" disabled /> | <input type="checkbox" disabled /> | <input type="checkbox" disabled /> | |
| Peanuts | <input type="checkbox" disabled /> | <input type="checkbox" disabled /> | <input type="checkbox" disabled /> | |
| Sesame | <input type="checkbox" disabled /> | <input type="checkbox" disabled /> | <input type="checkbox" disabled /> | |
| Soya | <input type="checkbox" disabled /> | <input type="checkbox" disabled /> | <input type="checkbox" disabled /> | |
| Sulphites | <input type="checkbox" disabled /> | <input type="checkbox" disabled /> | <input type="checkbox" disabled /> | |

---

## Cross-Contact and Service Notes

| Prompt | Notes |
|---|---|
| Shared equipment or prep surfaces to mention | |
| Storage or handling notes for service team | |
| Customer wording or caution note needed in reference pack | |
| Does this item feed a PPDS label? | Yes / No |

---

## Sign-Off

<input type="checkbox" disabled /> All ingredients checked against current evidence  
<input type="checkbox" disabled /> Final allergen outcome matches the matrix  
<input type="checkbox" disabled /> Customer-facing wording reviewed where needed  
<input type="checkbox" disabled /> Old version archived if superseded

| Role | Name | Date |
|---|---|---|
| Prepared by | | |
| Verified by | | |
| Approved for service | | |

---

## Common Failure Patterns

### 1. The sheet lists 'cake mix' or 'house sauce' with no evidence
Break down compound ingredients until the allergen conclusion is defendable.

### 2. Recipe sheets are filed but never linked to the live matrix
Update the matrix row and date stamp it on the same day.

### 3. Garnishes and toppings get forgotten
Treat garnish, drizzle, crumb, and optional add-ons as ingredients, not decoration.
